text:
(a) The portion of State Highway 191 in Ector County is designated as the Chris Kyle Memorial Highway.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

(1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Chris Kyle Memorial Highway and any other appropriate information; and

(2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.123 (Rosa Parks Memorial Parkway) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001(55), eff. September 1, 2019.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 225. State Highway Names
##### § 225.143 — Chris Kyle Memorial Highway

(a) The portion of State Highway 191 in Ector County is designated as the Chris Kyle Memorial Highway.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

    (1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Chris Kyle Memorial Highway and any other appropriate information; and

    (2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.123 (Rosa Parks Memorial Parkway) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001(55), eff. September 1, 2019.

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 55 (H.B.1483), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2017.*

erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.
Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.123 (Rosa Parks Memorial Parkway) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001(55), eff. September 1, 2019.
